name: Jade and Ruby Stir-Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into 1-inch pieces.
2. Cut the broccoli florets into bite-size pieces and the peeled stalks into thin slices.
3. Heat the oil in a hot wok or large skillet over high heat.
4. Add the chicken and stir-fry for 1 minute.
5. Add the broccoli and onion; stir-fry for 1 minute.
6. Add the water, cover, and cook for 5 minutes, stirring once.
7. Add the bell peppers and mushrooms; stir-fry for 3 minutes.
8. Add the stir-fry sauce and crushed red pepper. Cook, stirring until the chicken and vegetables are coated with the sauce.
